title: Aether Tools
description: Retextures the tools and swords from Aether II and gives them the vanilla color palette
body:
This pack retextures the tools and swords from Aether II and gives them the vanilla color palette, giving them the appearance of vanilla materials (iron, gold, diamond, etc). This basically makes them vanilla-compatible.

Why did I do this? It just looks cool.

Here's how the conversion goes:
- Skyroot -> Wood
- Holystone -> Stone
- Zanite -> Iron
- Arkenium -> Gold
- Gravitite -> Diamond and Netherite*

*Netherite too because it's just Netherite-coated Diamond tools

Credits to [The Aether Team](https://modrinth.com/organization/the-aether-team) for creating [Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) and [Aether II](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether-ii).

Made with [ASEprite](https://www.aseprite.org).
